description:
Your military career taught you to prepare for every mission. Your transition out deserves the same level of planning.

DashTen is the only transition tool built from the ground up for service members — not a generic career app with a military skin slapped on it. Whether you are 24 months from your separation date or already navigating your first year as a civilian, DashTen gives you a personalized battle plan to own every step of the road ahead.

YOUR TRANSITION ON A TIMELINE

Set your separation or retirement date and DashTen builds a phase-by-phase checklist around it — from 24 months out through your first year post-separation. The Transition Readiness Dashboard tracks your tasks, documents, and benefits enrollment progress in one place. You will always know what is done, what is next, and what needs your attention right now.

TURN YOUR SERVICE INTO A CAREER

Career tools translate your military experience into language civilian employers actually understand. The military-to-civilian resume translator, skills inventory, interview prep flashcards, and elevator pitch builder help you walk into any room with confidence. A salary negotiation guide and job offer comparison tool make sure you do not leave money on the table.

GET YOUR FINANCES SQUARED AWAY

The financial tools tackle the real questions veterans face: How does military pay translate to a civilian salary? How large is your income gap and how do you close it? What does a civilian budget actually look like? From a TSP rollover guide to a cost of living comparator, DashTen helps you make the financial decisions that build long-term stability, not just short-term relief.

NEVER LOSE ANOTHER DOCUMENT

Track your DD-214, VA records, medical files, and every other critical document through a clear status workflow — missing, requested, received, verified. No more chasing paperwork or wondering what you submitted and where.

BUILT FOR EVERY BRANCH

Army, Navy, Air Force, Marines, Coast Guard, Space Force — DashTen is for all of you. The Learning Hub delivers daily insights, mindset guides, and a civilian playbook to help you navigate the culture shift, not just the paperwork. Crisis support with one-tap access to the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline is always available, because taking care of your people includes taking care of yourself.

Stay motivated with streaks, weekly challenges, achievement badges, and milestone celebrations that keep you moving forward — one step at a time.

Your service was anything but average. Your transition should not be either.

Download DashTen and start your mission today.
promotionalText: Your military transition is too important to wing it. DashTen gives every service member a personalized plan, powerful tools, and real support.
